fields.name: strata_reference
fields.label: Strata Reference
fields.llm_hint: A strata plan or lot reference, often labeled 'Strata Plan', 'SP' followed by digits, 'Strata Reference', or 'Lot' — common on strata levies and body corporate invoices

fields.name: bsb
fields.label: BSB
fields.llm_hint: Bank BSB number, typically in the format XXX-XXX, found in payment or bank details sections
